title: Ukrainian Tomato Bake
description: A hearty, flavorful dish from Ukraine featuring fresh tomatoes baked with herbs and spices.
instructions: Slice the tomatoes into 1/4-inch thick rounds.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped onion, minced garlic, chopped parsley, salt, and black pepper.
Arrange a layer of tomato slices in the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Spread half of the onion mixture over the tomatoes.
Sprinkle half of the shredded delicious cheese over the onion mixture.
Repeat the layers: tomatoes, onion mixture, and delicious cheese.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top layer of cheese.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
